productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Grey Sweatshirt
description: Composition Grey sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a hood with drawstrings, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, one pocket in the middle with asymmetric openings on either sides, ribbed hem and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this grey sweatshirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The graphic print of popcorn on the chest expresses your fun side, while the blend of the cotton/polyester fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Layer this over a tee, with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
